summary: Completed testing of pagination features. All 14 backend tests passed. Fixed Pagination component to accept pageSizeOptions prop. Fixed PACGeralItem model to make justificativa optional.

minor.issue: PACGeralItem model had required 'justificativa' field but some DB records didn't have it - FIXED by making it Optional

ui_bugs.issue: pageSizeOptions prop was not being used - component used hardcoded PAGE_SIZE_OPTIONS
ui_bugs.fix: Updated Pagination.jsx to accept and use pageSizeOptions prop

GET /api/pacs/{pac_id}/export/pdf.description: PDF generates all items in single table without forced page breaks

GET /api/pacs-geral/{pac_geral_id}/expor.description: PDF generates all items in single table without forced page breaks

context_for_next_testing_agent: All pagination features are working correctly. PDF exports generate all items in a single table (no forced pagination to save paper). PAC Editor and PAC Geral Editor have pagination with 15/30/50/100 options. Portal Transparência Processos tab has pagination with 20/40/60/80/100 options. Fixed PACGeralItem model to make justificativa optional. Fixed Pagination component to accept pageSizeOptions prop.
